reproductive-rights.summary: Signed South Dakota's near-total abortion ban as governor and continues to support strict limits.

lgbtq-rights.summary: Voted against the Respect for Marriage Act and opposes federal LGBTQ protections.

drug-policy.summary: Opposes marijuana legalization and supports strict federal drug enforcement.

voting-rights.summary: Opposed federal voting rights legislation citing states' rights over elections.

taxes-and-spending.summary: Backed the 2017 Tax Cuts and Jobs Act and favors lower corporate and individual rates.

labor-and-unions.summary: Opposes the PRO Act and generally sides with business interests over union expansion.

privacy-and-surveillance.summary: Generally supports law enforcement surveillance tools with limited privacy reforms.

trade-and-tariffs.summary: Supports free trade principles but backed some Trump-era tariffs on China.

reproductive-rights.summary: Long record of opposing abortion rights and supporting federal restrictions.

lgbtq-rights.summary: Voted against the Respect for Marriage Act and opposes the Equality Act.

drug-policy.summary: Opposes marijuana legalization and supports maintaining federal drug scheduling.

voting-rights.summary: Led Republican opposition to federal voting rights bills as party leader.

labor-and-unions.summary: Opposes expanding union organizing rights and the PRO Act.
